programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A famous TV host (Roger Bart) forces himself on the young author (Anna Chlumsky) of an erotic novel; Detective Amaro uncovers a secret that could damage the author's career and her case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A girl's tragic death becomes a criminal case when a surgeon harvests her organs without parental consent.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Carisi and Rollins work together on an important arraignment; Benson tries to make Noah's Christmas wish come true when a case falls in her lap.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a sexual assault investigation is stalled for months, a woman puts her accusations against a popular athlete on a billboard.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As Benson teams up with the FBI on an unsolved case, Fin and Velasco investigate a flash mob robbery that led to a sexual assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A young man asks the SVU for help when he suspects his boss is preying on his sister; Velasco tries to convince a reluctant witness to testify in court.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives face off against a Colombian cartel and the Drug Enforcement Administration while investigating the brutal rape and murder of an undercover agent.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Benson goes into hiding to find justice for an abused housewife (Clea Duvall), uncovering a 34-year-old unsolved murder case in the process.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A young female Marine goes missing as she is about to give birth to her rapist's child; Olivia struggles with painful flashbacks of her sexual assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a night of drinking, a man (Scott Foley) wakes up with a head injury and a dead woman in his bed; Detectives Benson and Stabler try to piece together the crime by returning to the bar where the night began.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A girl's tragic death becomes a criminal case when a surgeon harvests her organs without parental consent.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Fin crosses international borders to catch a fugitive rapist; a political tug-of-war derails Barba's legal case; shocking allegations against Benson lead to the return of an old friend.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins and Carisi suspect a woman's bizarre rape story is fabricated; Benson goes on the offensive when her personal life is scrutinized.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson must disclose the secrets of her past to help a rape victim recall the details of one terrible, traumatic night.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A doctor arrested for sexually abusing his patients is set free after Cassidy's testimony causes a mistrial.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The search for an abducted woman and her young daughter leads Lt. Benson to cross paths with an old friend; Stone must make a tough decision on behalf of his sister.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Fin investigates a man's claim that his sister was gang raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An Alzheimer's patient claims she was raped, but her illness casts doubt on the case; Fin's sergeant orders come in.

programme.title: Premier League Live
programme.desc: Discussion and analysis of Premier League soccer.

programme.title: Live: Premier League Soccer
programme.desc: Manchester United (16-10-7) returns to Old Trafford to face Brentford (13-9-11) in Matchweek 34. The Bees seek to repeat their September upset, while the Reds aim to maintain third in the table. The Bees seek to climb above Chelsea in the standings.

programme.title: Live: Premier League Goal Zone
programme.desc: The best moments from the weekend in Premier League action.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By cutting a strand of a murdered man's hair into sections, forensics reveal a record of his last six months alive, and find he was frequently ingesting huge amounts of arsenic.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: SVU investigates when a father and his two young children are stabbed to death in their home; when the motives of the culprit are uncovered, Benson finds herself having mixed feelings about the nature of the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A serial rapist strikes again after two decades of silence, and SVU is determined to uncover the elusive criminal and bring justice to his many victims; Stone discovers that his father worked on the case before it went cold.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and the team investigate the death of a prostitute at a brothel; they wonder if there was foul play or if this could be a case of a junkie who relapsed, turned to tricking, got depressed and committed suicide.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and the SVU investigate the death of a man they believe to be a pedophile; when they dig deeper, they realize things are not what they seem and that the case actually hits really close to home.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU pursues a suspect when a child is discovered in the trunk of an abandoned car.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When defense attorney Nikki Staines is raped after a police charity event, Benson reluctantly looks to her own for a suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU investigates a he-said, she-said case when a woman crashes a wedding to accuse her therapist of sexual assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The release of a suspect in a hate crime case leaves Benson and Barba caught between two families seeking justice; as public protests escalate to violence, Benson goes to desperate lengths to make an arrest.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Fin crosses international borders to catch a fugitive rapist; a political tug-of-war derails Barba's legal case; shocking allegations against Benson lead to the return of an old friend.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the journalists who exposed the dangers of cult leader Reverend Jim Jones; interviews with witnesses to murders carried out by Jones' followers.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A family begins a relentless pursuit of justice after the death of Nevada attorney Susan Winters is ruled a suicide; Susan's parents open up about the seven-year case and their efforts to push back against the criminal justice system.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A family begins a relentless pursuit of justice after the death of Nevada attorney Susan Winters is ruled a suicide; Susan's parents open up about the seven-year case and their efforts to push back against the criminal justice system.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The team looks for a motive when a senator's daughter is attacked; a co-worker gives Kensi a perfect gift.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A federal agent's murder is linked to an ancient system of money transfer; Granger and Kensi work with the team from Afghanistan.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of two private military contractors ends up putting a member of the team in grave danger; Sam arranges a blind date for Callen.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a woman is followed home and raped outside of her building, neighbors witness the crime but neglect to call for help.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man under investigation for rape and murder threatens to expose the secrets of those who are working on the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Barba ask witnesses to risk their jobs after a news anchor makes an on-air accusation of rape against her boss.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a young woman is raped by a member of her church group, Barba argues that the First Amendment doesn't entitle a person to break the law.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a man is found castrated and left for dead, Rollins and Carisi uncover three female suspects who have possible motives; Langan gives devastating news to Benson.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An old kidnapping case is reopened when a young woman is found wandering in Central Park; Carisi's conversation with a reporter puts him in hot water.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The cops get tangled in an elaborate online hoax that leads to the rape of a popular social media star; Benson sets new ground rules with Sheila.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Emotions run high as the squad embarks on a frantic search for Benson's missing son.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a female pundit is assaulted during a protest, Benson and Barba struggle to put their political beliefs aside to help bring the attacker to justice.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an infant goes missing, members of the SVU find themselves taking sides in a family's right-to-die court case; Barba's interference in the case puts the entire DA's office in jeopardy.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a student disappears during a school trip to New York, the cops race to find a mysterious masked man; Fin and Stone both get visits from family.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU must break through military red tape when a soldier is suspected of sexual assault.

programme.title: THE SULTAN
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a grand talk show featuring 'King Sultan' Andre Taulany and 'Prince' Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a hilarious squad of royal guards. With spectacular guest stars and non-stop entertainment, this is one regal spectacle you definitely don't want to miss!

programme.title: Cinta Kadang Gulali Ke Bawah Kadang Gulali Keatas
programme.desc: Ruby (Shanice Margaretha) has to replace her mother, who sells cotton candy in front of the school. While serving a girl, Ruby is accused by Angkasa (Fero Walandouw) of being part of a child abduction syndicate. Ruby refuses to accept such accusations and defends herself.

programme.title: Belum Mantan Masih Demen
programme.desc: Feeling abandoned by Sigit (Kiki Farrel) after seeing him post videos with a beautiful girl, Maya (Shanice Margaretha) decides enough is enough. She embarks on a mission to completely transform her appearance and behavior, determined to become the kind of woman who can capture the heart of any handsome man.

programme.title: Ketika Level Tertinggi Cinta Adalah Soto Ayam
programme.desc: Raga is a reckless 'eternal student' struggling to finally graduate after years of slacking off. His life takes a turn when he clashes with Alin, a hardworking girl who sells soto to pay for her tuition at the same campus. Their constant bickering draws everyone's attention, but beneath the friction, a deep romance begins to brew.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: Nick Carraway arrives in New York in 1922. Chasing his own American Dream, Nick is drawn into the captivating world of the super-rich, their illusions, loves and deceits.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: Isabel, a fashion photographer, struggles to endear herself to her divorcee boyfriend's children and his ex-wife Jackie. However, a diagnosis of terminal cancer sparks a change in their relationship.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: After waking up with amnesia in a hospital, Robert Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks, one of his doctors, to protect the world from the evil plan of a scientist.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Josh narrowly avoids disaster driving into the mine with a load of fuel and Claudia's devastated when a jade slab cracks in half while she's running the saw.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Claudia and Robin scramble to find a second jade boulder before their buyer backs out of the deal, but they're running out of time and options.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Claudia turns to her dad Steve for help when she fears the biggest sale of her mining career is slipping through her fingers.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Tension boils over between Claudia, Robin and Josh as they make a last-ditch attempt to close a deal with a buyer from Vietnam.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Scientists from the University of Queensland come to the farm to practice artificial insemination techniques. Lyn tells the other students her heart-breaking secret and says she is considering a future in the crocodile industry. John reveals which two students are going to Kakadu.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: John takes Lyn and Luke to Kakadu where they raid nests and catch a four and a half metre male croc for research. Lyn returns to the place where her 11-year old granddaughter was taken by a croc and is finally at peace.

programme.title: Heavy Load
programme.desc: Major transport in an open-cast mine. A huge steel frame has to be moved to another site. A job for heavy transport professional Randolf Peters. The route: an obstacle course. Tight bends, steep downhill sections and obstructing power lines have to be overcome. The heavy transport has to be kept in sight every second. This means running backwards for kilometres and precision work with heavy transp

programme.title: Running Wild with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: Jack Stein: In The Box
programme.desc: Jack travels to Lucca, Italy, to share the British classic bangers and mash. A Michelin star chef proposes he radically changes the dish and transforms it into a masterpiece.

programme.title: Jack Stein: In The Box
programme.desc: Jack travels to landlocked Zagreb in Croatia to cook fish and chips for hungry locals and a politician. Will they like his version of the internationally renowned meal?

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine's old equipment and Josh's patience.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Hauling a 20-tonne boulder on the treacherous road out of the mine proves too much for their old truck 6-Pack.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: When a freak August snowstorm strands Claudia and Robin at Two Mile, Gary and Garon try to save the day by driving through the storm to bring them supplies but they wind up needing rescuing themselves.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive
programme.desc: In the penultimate stretch of their journey, the four remaining celebrities must find and eat the fruits of the forest, carefully separating nutritious treats from any potentially deadly dinners. After that, they endure another stormy night and face their most extreme challenge yet - crossing a 200ft ravine one by one on a rope. Bear also tests their ability to start a fire using only bamboo poles

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive
programme.desc: The final three contestants Kelly Holmes, Mike Tindall and Vogue Williams fight it out to be crowned Bear's Mission Survivor. The first task sees the group split for the first time, as the contenders abseil down a 300ft waterfall one by one. programme.desc: Episode 106 of Showdown on the Unbeatables features the Stang water blaster versus Ultra Every Dry's water repellent coating; the Republic Lagun VGC 4428 smart drill versus HPA's super alloy; and the Harris Hawk versus the XFactory X6 remote controlled racecar.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. On the series premiere, Jennifer, a glamper mom of four - two of which have down syndrome - learns camping skills to impress her outdoor-loving family while Bear learns about her international quest that helped save lives.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Who says you can't do adventure without legs? Former recon marine and war hero Jonathon lost both of his legs in Afghanistan, but his wild spirit lifts him to new heights. programme.desc: Cheng see his faint shadow in the mirror, but Liang’s remains clear. When the mirror with magical powers vanishes, Liang suspects it’s turned to ashes. Liang Yan appears in Liang’s dream and tells him that Cheng can be saved if someone takes his place.
